name: Reverse a singly linked list
task: Create /tmp/eval_rev/ll.py defining class Node(val, next=None) and a function reverse_list(head) that reverses a singly linked list and returns the new head. Iterative O(n) implementation. reverse_list(None) must return None.

validation.script:
import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_rev/ll.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); N = mod.Node; n3 = N(3); n2 = N(2, n3); n1 = N(1, n2); h = mod.reverse_list(n1); out = []
while h: out.append(h.val); h = h.next
assert out == [3,2,1]; assert mod.reverse_list(None) is None; print('OK')
